description_long: This is a plush toy modeled after the iconic cartoon character Mickey Mouse, featuring a large round black head with prominent circular ears, a white face, and expressive oval eyes. The toy has a small black nose, a simple smiling mouth, and wears classic red shorts with two white buttons on the front. Its arms are outstretched horizontally, ending in oversized white gloves with defined fingers. The legs are thin and black, leading down to large, bright yellow shoes. The overall appearance is soft and cuddly, with a matte fabric finish and a lightweight, squeezable form typical of stuffed toys.
description: A soft, plush Mickey Mouse toy with outstretched arms, red shorts, white gloves, and yellow shoes, featuring a friendly cartoon face.
description_view_0: Front view showing Mickey Mouse's face, red shorts with white buttons, white gloves, and yellow shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, nose, and the protruding tail, with one glove and shoe visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, ears, body, and the tail, with both gloves and shoes visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, nose, and tail, with one glove and shoe visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with wide open eyes and a small, simple smile. The eyebrows are neutral, contributing to a welcoming appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides and legs straight, head facing forward.
